prompt: ids.js uses hidden module-level state, so tests cannot get isolated ID sequences. Add createIdGenerator(prefix) — prefix defaults to 'id' — returning a new independent generator function; every generator starts its own count at 1 and produces `<prefix>-<n>`. Keep nextId exported and working exactly as before (it may delegate to a default generator, but calls to other generators must never affect it). Export both nextId and createIdGenerator.
